Transfer ownership of this presentation to {email}?

Enter the email of the new owner (must be an existing collaborator with edit access):

share.guest.error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

share.guest.error.permissionDenied: This share link does not allow commenting.
share.guest.error.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
share.guest.error.tokenExpired: Verification link has expired. Please request a new one.

share.registration.label: Access
share.revoke.description.collaborator: This will remove {name} as a collaborator. They will no longer have access to this presentation.
share.revoke.description.shareLink: This will revoke the share link. Anyone who has this link will no longer be able to access the presentation.
share.revoke.description.trash: This will move the presentation to trash. Collaborators will no longer have access.
share.revoke.messageHelp: This message will be shown to anyone who tries to access.
share.workspace.everyoneDesc: Appears in the shared workspace for all members.
share.workspace.privateDesc: Stays private; only you and the people you invite below can see it.
share.workspace.privateLocked: Only an admin can move this out of the workspace.
share.workspace.title: Who can find this in your workspace?
